description_long: This perfume bottle features a tall, rectangular body made of clear, glossy glass with a subtle gradient from light to dark, giving it a sophisticated and modern appearance. The front of the bottle is adorned with a prominent, raised metallic cross-shaped emblem that adds a striking decorative element. The cap is spherical, opaque white, and appears to be made of a smooth, matte material, contrasting with the reflective glass body. The bottle's clean lines and sharp edges are softened by the rounded cap, creating a balanced and elegant silhouette. The overall design is minimalistic yet bold, with the cross emblem serving as the focal point. No visible text or branding is present on the bottle.
description: A tall, rectangular glass perfume bottle with a white spherical cap and a raised metallic cross emblem on the front. The design is sleek, modern, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bottle's narrow rectangular profile and the spherical white cap on top.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the smooth, unadorned glass surface and the cap, with no decorative elements visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the same narrow profile and cap.
description_view_3: Front view highlighting the raised metallic cross emblem on the bottle's face, with the cap centered above.
attribute_bottle_cap_design: The cap is a smooth, opaque white sphere, medium-sized relative to the bottle, likely made of plastic or resin. It appears removable and sits flush atop the bottle, with a matte finish and no visible decorative features or mechanisms.
attribute_bottle_silhouette: Rectangular with straight vertical sides and a flat base, topped by a centered spherical cap. The silhouette is symmetrical and geometric.
attribute_decorative_elements: Raised metallic cross emblem on the front of the bottle
